messages.content:
Describe the context in which this vulnerability can be exploited.

IBM CICS TX Advanced 10.1, 11.1, and Standard 11.1 is vulnerable to stored cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows users to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.

This vulnerability can be exploited when an attacker is able to inject and store malicious JavaScript code in the application's Web UI. When other users access the compromised UI, the script executes, compromising session integrity and leading to potential credential theft.
